name: Preset
description: Preset — Managed Apache Superset platform providing embedded analytics and chart sharing with row-level security.

seo.title: Preset — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Preset: Preset — Managed Apache Superset platform providing embedded analytics and chart sharing with row-level security.

when_to_use: Managed Apache Superset with enterprise SSO and row-level security
Embedded analytics in SaaS products via Superset API
Collaborative data exploration on Snowflake and BigQuery
Replacing Metabase with managed Superset and chart sharing
Data visualization platform for data-driven product teams

pros: Good for teams already on Superset
cons: Ties you to Superset's UX quirks
Smaller ecosystem than Looker or Metabase
review.verdict: The easy button for running Apache Superset in production, if Superset is your chosen tool.
review.best_for: Data teams wanting Superset in production without running it themselves
review.not_for: Teams preferring Metabase, Looker, or those needing unmanaged customization
